name: Coleslaw with Ramen Noodles
recipeIngredient: 1 package Ramen noodles (chicken flavor), uncooked and broken into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a jar with the chicken flavor packet included, blend the dressing ingredients.
2. Pour the blended dressing over the shredded cabbage, sesame seeds, chopped almonds, green onions, and uncooked Ramen noodles.
3. Toss all ingredients together until evenly coated.
4. Serve immediately to prevent the noodles from becoming soggy.
